---
title: "Nosanalisamos"
author: "joyce kemeni"
date: "2026-04-23"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
#librarias

library(knitr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(pacman)


```


```{r}
#Eliminamos al usuario cuyo id es martsobm del conjunto de datos.
datos <- subset(datos, Id != "martsobm")

d_1<-datos%>%
  select(ALG,FP,DCS,MD)%>%
  mutate(across(everything(),~ case_when(.=="NC" ~ "3",
                                         .=="NP" ~ NA,
                                         grepl("^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$",.) ~ ., TRUE ~ NA)))



```



```{r}





```
